notes: All LLM systems use the active TurboFlux endpoint and gpt-5.5.
Native reasoning is disabled; protocol differences are recorded per run.

Adaptive case-level concurrency starts at 4 and may rise to 5; FastContext uses one closed listwise model judgment and the API request ceiling is 5. Systems within one case remain sequential and rotated.
Transient failures are retried up to 5 time(s) per run invocation.
Selection starts at the first balanced case.
